  1. Home

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

Information We Collect

When you submit a contact form on our website, we collect your name, email address, company name, phone number, and message. This information is used solely to respond to your enquiry.

How We Use Your Information

We use the information you provide to respond to your enquiries, provide our services, and improve our website. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties except as required by law.

Data Storage

Contact form submissions are transmitted securely and stored temporarily for processing. We retain enquiry data for a maximum of 12 months after the last contact.

Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@formaspacestudio.com.

Cookies

This website does not use cookies or any tracking technologies beyond standard server logs.

Contact

For questions about this privacy policy, contact us at info@formaspacestudio.com.

Formaspace Studio

A modern digital-first project delivery company combining engineering expertise, BIM, project controls, cost intelligence, and construction technology.

Services

  • Project Management Consultancy
  • Digital Engineering
  • Project Controls
  • Cost Management
  • Schedule Management
  • Construction Management
